title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.070 - Terms defined
text:
214.070.  Terms defined. — Wherever in sections 214.050 and 214.060 the term "street", "avenue", "thoroughfare" or "place" is used, the same shall be construed to mean any tract of land or part thereof in any cemetery set aside by plat or otherwise for the general use of the public, and shall include the plural of such term.
(RSMo 1939 § 15274) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14065
